message: contract revise can persist a plan that becomes invalid after a non-plan update because plan validation only runs when the plan field itself is revised.
Plain contract show drops context path and lines when a context selector also has symbol.
contract revise can accept a paths_in_scope change that makes an existing plan.expected_files entry invalid, because plan validation only runs when the plan field itself is updated.
plain contract show omits context path/lines when a context selector also has symbol, so valid plan context fields are not preserved without data loss in rendered output.
TestPlanDAGHashStability does not compare against a frozen pre-slice golden hash as required by the contract.
TestPlanDAGHashStability derives the expected hash from the current implementation instead of comparing against a frozen pre-slice SHA-256, so plan-less contract hash drift would still pass.
TestPlanDAGValid does not assert all plan fields survive show/show --json, and the plain-text depends_on assertion is ambiguous.
The scope-violation revise test does not cover changing paths_in_scope after a valid plan already exists.
User-facing contract docs omit the new contract.plan schema and structural validation rules exposed through contract revise and contract show.
